view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the fairness and policy engine.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the fairness and policy engine.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that 'Same fairness and policy engine used by all staffing demand types' is satisfied. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms or denies the existence of a shared fairness and policy engine across different staffing demand types. The evidence does not include specific API reads or persisted state checks that would allow for a definitive conclusion, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
